title.en: In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands o...

content.en:
After negotiating, Ye Tian gave Yan Yan's controller and half-tooth controller a large amount of resources and a large number of key fragments, which were enough for them to synthesize large treasure boxes, small treasure boxes, and several small keys.

Moreover, Ye Tian promised to continue to gather some key fragments for them in the coming years.

And the Yan Yan controller and the half-tooth controller naturally accepted it gladly.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

In the past hundreds of thousands of years, Ye Tian has gone to Tuta many times to obtain key fragments, and all the key fragments in exchange have been given to Yan Yan's controller and the half-tooth controller.

"After this wool picking, Tuta is almost worthless, I'm afraid that not many eternal masters will go to Tucheng in the future. Ye Tian muttered.

But it had nothing to do with him, he had already obtained the treasure he wanted most.

Next, Ye Tian began to refine and fuse the Ten Thousand Phases Statue.

Only when refining and fusing can he instantly use the Ten Thousand Phases Statue to fight.

Time passed, and the statue of Wanxiang was refined by Ye Tian little by little.

After a long time, the statue of Wanxiang was completely refined by Ye Tian, as if it had become a part of his body.

And at this time, he finally understood why the Wanxiang Statue could increase his strength, because the Wanxiang Statue contained a terrifying energy inside, and when this energy was channeled, it could make his strength change drastically.

However, fighting with the Statue of Ten Thousand Phases is not without a price, and this energy will shatter the body of control and destroy the body.

Unless it's a desperate situation, the Eternal Master is not willing to fight with the Statue of Ten Thousand Phases.

It seems that every time you use the Wanxiang Statue, it doesn't have much impact, but after a long time, it has too much impact on the foundation of the body, and if you use it too many times, the real body will collapse.

Almost all of the Eternal Masters have only one True Body, and once the True Body is abolished, it is truly doomed.

But Ye Tian didn't care, he had two true bodies, even if he abolished one, he could recondense it.

Therefore, the statue of Wanxiang is simply a perfect treasure, and it suits him too well.

"When you have time, let's test the combat power with the Ten Thousand Phases Statue. "

Ye Tian muttered.

For now, he still used the statue of Ten Thousand Phases to comprehend the changes in the Dao.

For example, the Dao of Time, and other changes in the Dao, he wants to raise it to 50 million.

After all, he had mastered three thousand Daos, and if he had mastered the fifty million variations of three thousand Daos, even if he hadn't mastered the hundreds of millions of changes of one Dao, he would definitely be able to easily create a top-notch Origin Control Technique.

Of course, it is really difficult to do this.

Time flies.

Eight million realm river years have passed, and at this time, Ye Tian has mastered a lot more in the way of time and the changes in other paths, but the help is still not very great, at least he can't improve his strength much.

And in the body of control, his progress is also minimal, and when he reaches the eighth level of the body of control, it is extremely difficult to make another progress.

And in terms of will, the eternal will of the peak of the ninth order is almost the limit.

this day.

Ye Tian was in Wanyuan Mountain, sitting in an attic with his senior brother Jiang You, and the two were drinking and chatting at the same time.

Ye Tian also wanted to have a good relationship with a few senior brothers, so he chatted with them from time to time and visited them for a moment or two, but there was no purpose.

But today, Ye Tian wanted to ask Senior Brother Jiang You about something.

"Senior brother, my will has been raised to the peak of the ninth order, and I can hardly feel any progress, is the peak will of the ninth order already the ultimate of will?" Ye Tian asked.

"The ninth-order peak will is naturally not the ultimate. Jiang You shook his head and said, "In the eyes of most Eternal Controllers, the Ninth Order Peak Eternal Will is the limit of will, but in fact, on top of the Ninth Order Peak Will, another level has been created, and this level cannot be called the Tenth Order Eternal Will. Therefore, in essence, it is still the peak will of the ninth order, and the fluctuation of the will is about the same, but the essence has changed. This level of will is called the ninth-order incarnation realm will. Once this state is reached, the will takes shape into anything, which can also be the essence. For example, the Eternal Master only needs a true body, and if the will reaches the ninth order of transformation, it can transform into the body and form the true body of the will. This is not a simple will clone, anyone can do it, but the real body of will has the same combat power as the ontology, and it can also be enlightened, which is incomparable to the will clone. For example, Shizun has more than one true body of will. The master we usually see is just a true body of will. "

"Ninth-Order Transformation Realm Will!"

Ye Tian's knowledge has increased greatly, if it weren't for the senior brother's puzzles, he really didn't know.

"Senior Brother, is it difficult to get the Ninth Order Peak Will to step into the Transformation Realm?" Ye Tian asked.

"Difficult!" Jiang You said with emotion: "Many Seventh and Eighth Realm-level Masters have not allowed the Ninth Order Peak Will to step into the Transformation Realm, but almost any Nine Realm-level Masters have mastered the Ninth Order Peak Will of the Transformation Realm. "

"Then senior brother, you ......"

Ye Tian asked.

"I'm lucky enough to step into the realm of will!"

As he spoke, Jiang You waved his hand, the void distorted, and another real body appeared.

"This is my true will!"

Jiang You introduced.

In the next moment, this will true body erupted with an incomparably terrifying will power, showing terrifying power with will power, influencing rules and energy, and only then can it burst out with combat power comparable to the ontology.

Ye Tian used the copy talent to probe this will true body, but did not detect any talent, so this will clone does not contain natural abilities, although it can participate in the changes of the Dao of Enlightenment, or explode terrifying combat power, but it is still different from the real body.

"Senior brother, the Will True Body can't fight for a long time, right?" Ye Tian said again.

"It's true that you can't fight for long. Jiang You nodded, "Basically, the staying power of the will clone is at most one-tenth of the true body, and once injured, the recovery speed is a little slow, after all, it is only the will true body, not the real real body." But if you go to explore some forbidden places, the will clone is very useful, even if it falls, at most, it will not be able to condense the true body of the will for a long time, and it will not fall. "

Ye Tian nodded, indicating that he understood.

"Senior brother, if the body of control is promoted to the peak of the ninth order, can it continue to improve?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Yes!" Jiang You affirmed: "The ninth-order peak control body, there is also a primordial-level control body on it. The reason why this level was named is because in the Sea of Origin, the first great existence to break the body of the ninth-order peak control is called the Primordial Ancestor, and if the other party wants to order this name, the latecomer must use it. Jiang You explained.

"Thank you, Senior Brother, for your advice. "

Ye Tian thanked.
